backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Journey, LocationInfo, UserProfile, CityRating, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, WebsiteLayoutSettings, ScheduleItem, MapBookmark, VibeItem, GeonameCity) and state variables using OrderedMaps for storing travel-related data with blob storage and access control integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features for displaying local time and UTC offset time below the UTC offset selector in the InteractiveGlobe component, all with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend TypeScript/React components including App, pages, map components, hooks, dialogs, admin panels, authentication, media galleries, and file storage utilities for the travel map explorer application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React application and includes the SunCalc library for solar position calculations.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders LocationMapExplorer with BackendDebugger and Toaster components.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin control panel component managing journeys, schedules, travel spots, music albums, geoname data, and timezones with calendar-based date-range selection, time inputs, and collapsible sections for organizing travel data.
Development utility component that exposes the backend actor to window.backend for console debugging, displays principal information, and provides instructions for role verification and admin management.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: Component for managing city photo/video albums with file upload (JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, MP4, MOV), real-time social media URL validation (YouTube, Instagram), and media organization with authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: React component for managing geoname city data with import from TSV files, CRUD operations, pagination, and search functionality. Includes classification logic based on feature codes (Capital, Global City, Major City, etc.).
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: React component that renders a 10-heart rating system with partial fill support, hover effects, and click-to-rate functionality. Supports readonly mode and multiple sizes (sm/md/lg).
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: Complex 3D globe component using Three.js with timezone overlays, city markers, country borders, solar terminator/twilight rendering, flight animations, and interactive camera controls. Includes object pooling for labels and ripples.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders journey itinerary in a playful scrapbook/polaroid style with doodle aesthetics. Displays schedule items grouped by day with colorful headers and rotated card effects.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: React component that displays a journey's itinerary in a vintage postcard-themed dialog with retro styling, showing schedule items grouped by day with calendar, map, and time icons.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: Dialog component for adding/editing/deleting location information with photo upload functionality. Handles file validation, preview, and integration with blob storage and backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: Authentication panel component using Internet Identity for login/logout with status display, principal ID truncation, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: Leaflet-based map component displaying travel spots, bookmarks, and schedule items with custom icons, popups, city filtering, and route visualization. Includes media gallery integration and day-based route coloring.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media content (YouTube, Instagram) with navigation controls and fullscreen support.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: Admin interface for managing music albums and songs, including CRUD operations, file uploads, search/filter functionality, and integration with backend queries and blob storage.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog component that displays a browsable music collection organized by albums, allowing users to select and play songs with album/artist metadata.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar with playback controls (play/pause, skip, volume), progress tracking, and auto-play support that manages audio playback across the application.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: Admin component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, with validation, IndexedDB caching, backend persistence, and manual execution workflow with step-by-step verification.
Displays journeys in a collapsible panel with filtering (live/upcoming/past), schedule management, and itinerary views. Supports flight animations, 2D map navigation, and both doodle and retro itinerary display modes.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: Manages travel spots with CRUD operations, file uploads, social media links, and heart ratings. Provides a dialog-based UI for creating/editing spots with city filtering, media management, and type categorization.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: Shows bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city and type in a collapsible panel. Provides icons and colors for different spot types and allows focusing on specific spots or bookmarks on the map.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: Settings dialog for website layout preferences including music player toggle and default search location. Displays local time and provides tabbed interface for map and display settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks and utilities for backend data operations including location geocoding via Nominatim API, social media URL validation (YouTube/Instagram), country name normalization, and website layout preferences management.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including color schemes for UI components, music player styling, and specific heading color rules for different background modes.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Calculates solar declination angle for a given day of year using Earth's axial tilt formula. Includes test cases for equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Provides utilities to find timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset with quarter-hour precision, using Intl API for DST-aware calculations.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Handles timezone boundary detection and local time calculations, loading timezone GeoJSON data from backend or IndexedDB cache with validation.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Timezone boundary rendering library for 3D globe visualization using Three.js, handling coordinate conversion, polygon unwrapping across antimeridian, and quarter-hour precision UTC offset calculations with DST awareness.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page with 2D/3D view modes, location search, travel spots, bookmarks, music player, timezone visualization, and globe controls.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and utilities for styling schedule items by day, including day labels, color assignment, and day index computation.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups and sorts schedule items by calendar day and time, building chronological route coordinates for multi-day itineraries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for parsing URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, border radius utilities, animations for accordions, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a time zone display app with 3D globe visualization, local time display, and dynamic UTC offset conversion features positioned below a UTC offset selector.
